metadata.description: Name of the environment (e.g., dev, prod)
Project name used in resource group naming
Name for the Document Intelligence resource
Location for Azure OpenAI (may differ from primary location due to model availability)
Name of the Cognitive Services account
Kind of Cognitive Services account (e.g., FormRecognizer, OpenAI)
Base name for AI Services resources
Base name for AI Foundry resources
AI Services resource ID (created separately to avoid RP race conditions)
Name of the database to create

connectionString.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('name')), '2023-08-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('databaseName'), parameters('adminLogin'), parameters('adminPassword'))]
